No. II(2)/AG/980/2018.
[AGRICULTURE – NOTIFICATION OF CROPS,  DISTRICTS AND REVENUE VILLAGES FOR PADDY II  (SAMBA / 
THALADI/ PISHANAM) 2018-2019 SEASON UNDER PRADHAN MANTRI FASAL BIMA YOJANA AND PUBLICATION 
IN THE STATE GOVERNMENT GAZETTE – ORDERS – ISSUED.]

*********
ORDER:—G.O. Ms. No. 227,  Agriculture (AP2), 7th September 2018.
 
In the Government Order ﬁ rst read above, orders were issued for notiﬁ cation of crops, districts, ﬁ rkas, revenue villages, 
insurance units and approved premium rates for Agriculture and Horticulture Crops for Kharif 2018 under “Pradhan Mantri 
Fasal Bima Yojana”.
 2. In the Government Order second read above, the Government have accorded administrative approval for implementation 
of Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) at an outlay of Rs.631.60 crore in all the districts of Tamil Nadu except 
Chennai during 2018-2019 as per the existing guidelines and instructions issued by Government of India.
3. In his letter fourth read above, the Director of Agriculture has stated that as the Sowing Season for Paddy – II 
(Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam) commences in the month of August and prolongs upto November and the sowing of Paddy-II 
crop is taken up both in Kharif & Rabi, Paddy II has to be notiﬁ ed in advance under “Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana” 
before the commencement of the season. This was accepted in the 38th State Level Coordination Committee on Crop 
Insurance meeting held on 30.3.2017 and accordingly a special meeting of State Level Coordination Committee on Crop 
Insurance was conducted on 30.07.2018 under the Chairmanship of Agricultural Production Commissioner and Principal 


2
Secretary to Government, Agriculture Department to notify Paddy – II (Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam) during 2018-2019. 
The Committee has ﬁ nalized the insurance units and approved premium rates and accepted for notiﬁ cation.
4. The Director of Agriculture has, therefore, sent proposals for notiﬁ cation of Paddy II (Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam) 
during the year 2018-2019 and requested the Government to issue orders.
5. The Government, after careful examination of the proposal of the Director of Agriculture accept the same and accordingly 
hereby notify (i) Paddy II crop (Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam); (ii) Districtwise approved premium rates for Paddy–II; and
 (iii) Cluster wise, District wise Insurance units (Revenue Villages) during 2018-2019 under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima 
Yojana as shown in the Annexures I, II and III respectively to this order.
6. The Government also direct that –
(i) the scheme shall be implemented in the following three clusters:-

(iii) the Indemnity Level for the purpose of calculation of threshold yield will be 90% for low risk districts, 80% for 
medium risk districts and 70% for high risk districts;
(iv) the Remote Sensing Based Information and Insurance for Crops in Emerging Economies (RIICE) Piloted during 
Rabi 2016-17 season for computation of the Area and Yield Loss under Prevented Sowing shall continue during 2018-
2019 also;
(v) the compensation claims under the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana Scheme shall be settled on the basis of 
yield data furnished by the Department of Economics and Statistics as per prescribed cut-oﬀ  dates for the notiﬁ ed crops 
/ districts / ﬁ rkas / revenue villages for eﬀ ective implementation of Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana scheme for Paddy 
II (Samba/ Thaladi / Pishanam) 2018-2019 season and not on the basis of the Annavari Certiﬁ cate / Gazette notiﬁ cation 
declaring the area as Drought / Flood / Cyclone aﬀ ected etc., by the District Collectors;
(vi) the District Level Monitoring Committees under the Chairmanship of District Collectors are authorised to ﬁ x the 
seasonality discipline for 2018-2019 for prevented sowing / failed sowing besides notifying the post harvest losses at 
farm level and invoking mid-season adversity for on-account payment as done during 2016-2017.
 (By Order of the Governor)
 
GAGANDEEP SINGH BEDI, 
 
 
 
Agricultural Production Commissioner and  
 
Principal Secretary to Government.


3
 PRADHAN MANTRI FASAL BIMA YOJANA (PMFBY)
NOTIFICATION FOR PADDY- II DURING 2018 -2019
ANNEXURE I 
(G.O.Ms.No.227, Agriculture (AP2) Department, dated: 07.09.2018)
Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) will be implemented in all districts of Tamil Nadu (except Chennai) with 
the State Government subsidy during 2018-2019 for Paddy II (Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam). 
I. OBJECTIVES OF PMFBY:
PMFBY aims at supporting sustainable production in agriculture by way of 
 
a) Providing ﬁ nancial support to farmers suﬀ ering crop loss/damage arising out of unforeseen events.
 
b) Stabilizing the income of farmers to ensure their continuance in farming.
 
c) Encouraging farmers to adopt innovative and modern Agriculture practices.
 
d) Ensuring ﬂ ow of credit to the agriculture sector, which will, contribute to food security, crop diversiﬁ cation 
and enhancing growth and competitiveness of agriculture sector besides protecting farmers from production risks.
II. COVERAGE OF FARMERS:
All farmers including share croppers and tenant farmers growing the notiﬁ ed crops in the notiﬁ ed areas are eligible 
for coverage.
 
• 
Compulsory to loanee farmers.
 
• 
Optional for non - loanee farmers.
III. COVERAGE OF RISKS AND EXCLUSIONS:
1. PREVENTED SOWING/ PLANTING RISK - Insured area is prevented from sowing / planting due to deﬁ cit rainfall 
or adverse seasonal conditions and non release of irrigation water on scheduled date of opening of dam for irrigation 
in its command areas.
2. STANDING CROP (SOWING TO HARVESTING) - Comprehensive risk insurance is provided to cover yield losses 
due to non - preventable risks viz. Drought, dry spells, ﬂ ood, inundation, pests and diseases, landslides, natural ﬁ re and 
lightening, storm, hailstorm, cyclone, typhoon, tempest, hurricane and tornado. 
3. POST-HARVEST LOSSES - Coverage against speciﬁ c perils of cyclone, cyclonic rains and unseasonal rains is 
available only upto a maximum period of two weeks from harvesting, for those crops which are allowed to dry in cut 
and spread condition in the ﬁ eld after harvesting. 
4. LOCALIZED CALAMITIES - Loss/damage resulting due to occurrence of identiﬁ ed localized risks viz., hailstorm, 
landslide and inundation aﬀ ecting isolated farms in the notiﬁ ed area. 
 
In the Special State Level Coordination Committee on Crop Insurance meeting conducted for notiﬁ cation of Paddy 
II on 30.07.2018, the Committee has authorized the District Level Monitoring Committees under the Chairmanship of 
District Collectors to ﬁ x the seasonality discipline for prevented sowing / failed sowing and Post harvest losses at farm 
level and mid-season adversity for  on-account payment (vide G.O.Ms.No.293, Agriculture (AP6) Department, dated 
12.9.2016) as done during 2016-2017.

4
IV. SUM INSURED:
The Sum Insured for Paddy notiﬁ ed vide G.O.(Ms).No.123, Agriculture (AP2) Department, dated: 03.05.2018 shall be 
adopted and will be the same for both loanee and non-loanee farmers. 
V. PREMIUM RATE AND PREMIUM SUBSIDY:
 
FARMER’S PREMIUM: 
Actuarial Premium Rate (APR) would be charged under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) by the Implementing 
Agency (IA). The rate of Insurance Charges for Paddy II (Samba/Thaladi/Pishanam) payable by the farmer is 1.5% of 
Sum Insured or Actuarial rate, whichever is less .
VI. SEASONALITY DISCIPLINE/ CUT-OFF DATE:
The seasonality / cut-oﬀ  date for Paddy II (Samba/Thaladi/Pishanam) cultivated during August 2018 to January 2019 
is ﬁ xed as 30th November, 2018.

Revenue village is the Insurance unit for Paddy II 
•

• 
The discrepancies if any noted in the hierarchy of the notiﬁ ed units at any stage of implementation of the scheme 
during enrollment, implementation / uploading on Government of India portal / while processing of compensation shall 
be reconciled by the Insurance Companies with the Department of Economics and Statistics and the hierarchy ﬁ xed by 
Department of Economics and Statistics shall be adopted as ﬁ nal.
VIII. 
FURNISHING HISTORICAL YIELD DATA FOR THE NOTIFIED UNITS 
The Department of Economics & Statistics will furnish the historical yield data for the past 11 years and normal area 
sown for the notiﬁ ed units in the hierarchy speciﬁ ed in the notiﬁ cation for Paddy-II (Samba / Thaladi / Pishanam) to 
the Insurance Companies. The Insurance Companies shall exclude the calamity years 2012-2013 & 2016-2017 for the 
purpose of calculation of Threshold yield. 
IX. YIELD OF FINAL PRODUCE TO BE TAKEN FOR COMPUTATION OF COMPENSATION CLAIMS
The Insurance Companies should adopt the yield of paddy in terms of Rice (kg / Hectare) for computation of 
threshold yield and compensation claims.
X. MANDATORY DOCUMENTS FOR ENROLMENT
The following documents are mandatory for enrolment:-
• 
Proposal form
• 
Registration form
• 
Adangal
 
o 
Adangal alone for enrolment of Loanee & Non-Loanee farmers in normal cases. 
 
o 
Sowing certiﬁ cate issued by Village Administrative Oﬃ  cer in case of prevented sowing and purchase of 
insurance before sowing
• 
A copy of Aadhaar Card
• 
A copy of ﬁ rst page of Bank Pass Book
 
GAGANDEEP SINGH BEDI, 
 
 
 
Agricultural Production Commissioner and  
 
Principal Secretary to Government.
